name: Chef Freddy's Apple-Rhubarb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the fruit together and place it in the bottom of a 9-inch x 11-inch glass cake/baking pan.
2. Mix the gelatin, sugar, and cinnamon, then pour over the fruit. Cover with marshmallows, then pour the cake mix on top.
3. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes. Cool to room temperature and refrigerate until ready to serve, garnish as desired.
